phrases.intent_en: Ask where the yachts are docked
phrases.text_local: Où sont ancrés les yachts, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn ahn-KRAY lay YOT seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Port Vauban is one of Europe's largest marinas, with over 2,000 berths. It's known for hosting superyachts during the Cannes Film Festival.

responses.english: The big yachts are on the billionaires' quay, straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: lay grahn YOT son soor luh kay day meel-yar-DAIR, too DRWAH
responses.french: Les grands yachts sont sur le quai des milliardaires, tout droit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry to the islands departs
phrases.text_local: Où part le ferry pour les îles ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PAR luh feh-REE poor lay ZEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries from Port Vauban run to the Îles de Lérins (Saint-Honorat and Sainte-Marguerite). The crossing takes about 20 minutes.

responses.english: At the end of the quay, over there. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: oh boo doo kay, lah-BAH. ruh-gar-DAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Au bout du quai, là-bas. Regardez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest marine supply store is
phrases.text_local: Où est le magasin d'équipements maritimes le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh mah-gah-ZAN day-keep-MAN mah-ree-TEEM luh ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: The port area has several marine supply shops for boating equipment, fishing gear, and nautical accessories.

responses.english: There's one near the quay, five minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah uhn preh doo kay, ah sank mee-NOOT ah pyay
responses.french: Il y en a un près du quai, à cinq minutes à pied.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there's a restaurant with a sea view
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un restaurant avec vue sur la mer ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un res-to-RAN ah-vek VYOO soor lah MAIR
phrases.cultural_note: Port Vauban has many waterfront restaurants ranging from casual cafés to fine dining, all with harbor views.

responses.english: Yes, several along the port. I recommend booking.
responses.phonetic: wee, plu-ZYUR luh lohn doo POR. zhuh ruh-koh-MAHND duh ray-zair-VAY
responses.french: Oui, plusieurs le long du port. Je recommande de réserver.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Antibes marine museum
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le musée de la marine à Antibes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh myoo-ZAY duh lah mah-REE-nah an-TEEB
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée de la Mer (Sea Museum) is located in the old bastion near the port and documents Antibes' maritime history.

responses.english: Follow the signs toward the bastion, it's two minutes away.
responses.phonetic: swee-VAY lay pah-NOH vair luh bas-TYON, say ah duh mee-NOOT
responses.french: Suivez les panneaux vers le bastion, c'est à deux minutes.
